interface.shortDescription: Full Stack Software Factory for .NET, Angular, NestJS, Next.js and Python
interface.longDescription: Use Factoria to enforce Clean Architecture, approved ADRs, mandatory policies (security/testing/standards) and workflow skills across your full-stack projects. Supports .NET 8, Angular 16+, NestJS 11, Next.js 14 and FastAPI.
